summary: Completed e2e testing of Staff Portal Migration. All 14 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests PASSED including login, profile matching, status buttons, WebRTC socket connection, and Twilio phone registration. Profile loading correctly verifies user_id match. Status buttons are enabled for users with linked profiles.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Portal migration testing complete. The Next.js portal runs on localhost:3001 (development) and is accessed via /staff route. Key verified features: 1) Login with profile matching - profile.user_id must match logged-in user.id, 2) Status buttons disabled when no profile linked, 3) Warning banners appear appropriately, 4) AI Characters sorted by order field, 5) WebRTC socket connects via Socket.IO path /api/socket.io, 6) Twilio phone device registers for browser calling. The preview URL (https://build-unblock-1.preview.emergentagent.com) runs the Expo frontend which redirects staff to external portal at staff.radiocheck.me. The portal directory /app/portal is separate Next.js app deployed to Vercel.

staff_login.details: Login with test@staff.com/test123 returns user with id, role, name, and token

profile_user_id_matching.details: Profile loaded correctly matches userId 69bb1c83f3e67acd3b55b138 to counsellor profile 'Test Staff' (profile_id: b0c9595e-76f0-434e-aca7-a635bf87a189)

status_buttons.details: All 3 status buttons (Available, Busy, Off Duty) are enabled when profile is linked. Status update to 'available' worked correctly.

no_profile_warning_banner.details: Warning banner NOT shown for users with linked profiles (correct behavior)

socket_error_warning_banner.details: Warning banner NOT shown when socket connection is successful

ai_characters_sorted_by_order.details: Characters returned sorted by order field: frankie(0), tommy(2), doris(3), bob(4), sentry(5), jack(5), margie(7), rita(8), catherine(9), baz(10)

live_chat_rooms_api.details: Returns list of chat rooms with status, staff_id, messages etc.

counsellors_api.details: Returns 15 counsellors with user_id field for profile matching

peer_supporters_api.details: Returns 4 peer supporters with user_id field

webrtc_socket_connection.details: Socket.IO connected to server, user registered successfully with status 'online'

verification_of_reported_issues.issue_1_calls_chats_not_appearing: VERIFIED FIXED - WebRTC socket connects and registers, Live Chat shows in UI
verification_of_reported_issues.issue_2_staff_status_updates_failing: VERIFIED FIXED - Status update to 'available' succeeded via API
verification_of_reported_issues.issue_3_user_sees_wrong_profile: VERIFIED FIXED - Profile loading verifies user_id match
verification_of_reported_issues.issue_4_ai_character_sort_order: VERIFIED FIXED - Characters sorted by order field
